evidence: `src/types/shots.ts` and `src/shared/hooks/useShots.ts` are pass-through facades (pure re-exports) that preserve legacy import paths instead of removing migration indirection.

`src/shared/lib/tasks/travelBetweenImages/legacyStructureVideo.ts` and `src/shared/components/ImageGenerationForm/types.ts` carry broad deprecated-field compatibility surfaces plus sunset notes, indicating active dual-path migration residue.

`src/shared/lib/queryDefaults.ts`, `src/shared/lib/storagePaths.ts`, and `src/shared/lib/imageAspectRatio.ts` include extensive explanatory/docstyle blocks for straightforward helpers, with comments frequently restating behavior.

`src/shared/lib/simpleCacheValidator.ts` and `src/shared/lib/debug/debugRendering.ts` contain high-volume console/debug scaffolding (global window helpers, repeated console output patterns), consistent with AI-style diagnostic boilerplate.

findings.title: Legacy facade wrappers keep migration indirection in hot import paths
evidence: `src/shared/hooks/useShots.ts` only re-exports `./shots` as a canonical barrel.
findings.suggestion: Migrate remaining call sites to canonical modules and remove transitional facades once import count reaches zero.
